daily_summary.headline: SpaceX Leads the Day with Multiple Launches

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | NROL-172
top_events.description: SpaceX's Falcon 9 Block 5 launches a reconnaissance satellite for the National Reconnaissance Office from Vandenberg SFB, CA.
top_events.action: Watch live stream for best viewing.

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Dragon CRS-2 SpX-34
top_events.description: SpaceX's Dragon CRS-2 mission resupplies the ISS with critical materials and research payloads.
top_events.action: Follow live updates for mission progress.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunities
top_events.description: Moderate geomagnetic activity offers aurora viewing chances at higher latitudes.
